page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, and the system is configured with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, meaning hyperthreading is disabled to ensure dedicated physical execution resources per vCPU.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between instances and external services.

Given its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated physical cores, this instance offers high compute density. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs makes it a cost-efficient option for workloads that are heavily CPU-bound but do not require local NVMe storage or hardware acceleration. It is suited for compute-intensive workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, web serving, and distributed analytics.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor on the x86_64 architecture, the instance provides 64 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and does not include local storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Lacking integrated GPUs and local storage, this instance is designed for cost-efficient, CPU-heavy workloads. It is suited for compute-intensive tasks, batch processing, and distributed web serving applications that rely on network-attached storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-compute workloads without local storage.
